method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: In creating 'Echoes of Digital Ruins,' I wanted to explore the tension between human experience and the overwhelming presence of technology. The layered approach allows me to highlight both decay and resilience, showcasing how we navigate a landscape shaped by machines. I aim for a visual dialogue that reflects the complexities of our existence under digital pressure.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The documentary-glitch aesthetic serves as a powerful reminder of the fleeting nature of memory and the traces left behind by technology. By using high-contrast visuals with a muted counterweight, I emphasize the stark differences between human emotion and mechanical influence.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: documentary-glitch, archival, spectral. Primary medium language: glitch composites from synthetic documentary scenes. Core motifs: trace, decay, signal. Arc context: Arc "Ruins of Broadcast" step 1/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: over-clean edges. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Ruins of Broadcast step 1/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
